top_signals.title: Joining up services for people facing multiple disadvantage
top_signals.summary: Policy Lab worked with MHCLG's Changing Futures programme to shape services around the lived experience of people facing multiple disadvantage.

top_signals.title: Bitmine adds 127,000 ether, bringing treasury to 5.54 million ETH as Tom Lee calls crypto selloff ‘superficial’
top_signals.summary: Bitmine purchased 126,971 ETH for about $207M, lifting its treasury to 5.54M tokens worth $9B as ether trades near 30% below its April highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Pulte is 'Woefully Under Qualified' To Be Intelligence Director Says Riggleman
top_signals.summary: Denver Riggleman, Former-Republican Congressman from Virginia and CEO of RIIG Technology joins to discuss the latest from Congress and gave his thoughts on the promotion of Bill Pulte. At least seven Senate Democrats would have to vote in favor in order to re-authorize Section 702, but they have threatened to block any extension if the White House doesn’t withdraw Pulte’s appointment.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Trump’s $100,000 H-1B visa fee blocked by judge
top_signals.summary: Ruling says the six-figure charge is an unauthorised tax and ordered it to be suspended

top_signals.title: U.S. natural gas storage capacity increased slightly in 2025
top_signals.summary: Underground working natural gas storage capacity in the Lower 48 states increased slightly in 2025, according to our latest data, with growth concentrated in the South Central and Mountain regions. Underground natural gas storage provides a source of energy when demand increases, balancing U.S. energy needs. We calculate natural gas storage capacity in two ways: demonstrated peak capacity and working gas design capacity. Both increased in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
